mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shop (type_id, name, address, images, price, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{typeId}, #{name}, #{address}, #{images}, #{price}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select s.*, st.name as type_name from shop s left join shop_type st on s.type_id = st.id where s.name like CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.update:
update shop
type_id = #{typeId},
name = #{name},
images = #{images},
address = #{address},
price = #{price},
comments = #{comments},
sold = #{sold},
score = #{score},
where id = #{id}
